customers.text:
Table: customers
Description: Table with 2500 rows
Columns:
- customer_id (integer) [PRIMARY KEY]
- name (character varying)
- email (character varying)
- country (character varying)
- created_at (timestamp without time zone)

order_items.text:
Table: order_items
Description: Table with 30000 rows
Columns:
- item_id (integer) [PRIMARY KEY]
- order_id (integer) [FOREIGN KEY -> orders.order_id]
- product_id (integer) [FOREIGN KEY -> products.product_id]
- quantity (integer)
- unit_price (numeric)

orders.text:
Table: orders
Description: Table with 12000 rows
Columns:
- order_id (integer) [PRIMARY KEY]
- customer_id (integer) [FOREIGN KEY -> customers.customer_id]
- order_date (date)
- status (character varying)
- total_amount (numeric)

payments.text:
Table: payments
Description: Table with 9430 rows
Columns:
- payment_id (integer) [PRIMARY KEY]
- order_id (integer) [FOREIGN KEY -> orders.order_id]
- payment_date (date)
- amount (numeric)
- method (character varying)

products.text:
Table: products
Description: Table with 76 rows
Columns:
- product_id (integer) [PRIMARY KEY]
- product_name (character varying)
- category (character varying)
- price (numeric)
- stock_quantity (integer)

projects.text:
Table: projects
Description: Table with 250 rows
Columns:
- id (integer) [PRIMARY KEY]
- name (character varying)
- description (text)
- created_at (timestamp without time zone)

tasks.text:
Table: tasks
Description: Table with 12000 rows
Columns:
- id (integer) [PRIMARY KEY]
- title (character varying)
- status (character varying)
- assigned_to (integer) [FOREIGN KEY -> users.id]
- project_id (integer) [FOREIGN KEY -> projects.id]
- created_at (timestamp without time zone)
- due_date (date)

users.text:
Table: users
Description: Table with 1200 rows
Columns:
- id (integer) [PRIMARY KEY]
- name (character varying)
- email (character varying)
- created_at (timestamp without time zone)

query_cache.text:
Table: query_cache
Description: Table with 5 rows
Columns:
- cache_key (character varying) [PRIMARY KEY]
- normalized_question (text)
- max_tables (integer)
- response (text)
- sql_query (text)
- results (jsonb)
- metadata (jsonb)
- hit_count (integer)
- created_at (timestamp without time zone)
- last_used_at (timestamp without time zone)
